# vendor/

Place the following binaries here before running `build.bat`:

| File | Source |
|------|--------|
| `ffmpeg.exe` | [BtbN FFmpeg Builds](https://github.com/BtbN/FFmpeg-Builds/releases) — `ffmpeg-master-latest-win64-gpl.zip` |
| `ffprobe.exe` | Same archive |

These files are bundled into the standalone executable by PyInstaller and are
**not** committed to the repository (see `.gitignore`).
